entries.source: Separate documented fact from plausible reconstruction.
entries.value: Scheid gedocumenteerde feiten van plausibele reconstructie.

entries.source: Separate fact from invention
entries.value: Skei feit van versinsel

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Scheid uitspraken in rol van bewysenotas.

entries.source: Separate known facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, and speculation. Do not fabricate direct quotes or fake sources. Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, or persecution. Keep in-world knowledge separate from historian knowledge.
entries.value: Scheid bekende feiten, plausibele reconstructie, betwiste interpretatie en speculatie. Verzin geen directe citaten of valse bronne. Romantiseer geweld, rijk, slawerny, kaste, siekte, onderdrukking of vervolging nie. Hou kennis binne die wereld gescheiden van kennis van historici.

entries.source: SERVICE means the https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app website/inspir Mobile app operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession). USAGE DATA is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device). DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data. THE USER is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.
entries.value: SERVICE beteken die https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app webwerf/inspir Mobile-app wat deur Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) bedryf word. PERSONAL DATA beteken data oor 'n lewende individu wat uit daardie data geidentifiseer kan word, of uit daardie data en ander inligting wat in ons besit is of waarskynlik in ons besit sal kom. USAGE DATA is data wat outomaties ingesamel word, hetsy deur die gebruik van die Diens gegenereer of uit die Diens-infrastruktuur self, byvoorbeeld die duur van 'n bladsybesoek. COOKIES is klein leers wat op jou toestel gestoor word, soos 'n rekenaar of mobiele toestel. DATA CONTROLLER beteken 'n natuurlike of regspersoon wat, alleen, gesamentlik of saam met ander persone, die doeleindes bepaal waarvoor en die wyse waarop persoonlike data verwerk word of verwerk gaan word. Vir die doel van hierdie Privacy Policy is ons 'n Data Controller van jou data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) beteken enige natuurlike of regspersoon wat data namens die Data Controller verwerk. Ons kan die dienste van verskeie Service Providers gebruik om jou data doeltreffender te verwerk. DATA SUBJECT is enige lewende individu wat die onderwerp van Personal Data is. THE USER is die individu wat ons Diens gebruik. Die User stem ooreen met die Data Subject, wat die onderwerp van Personal Data is.

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding
entries.value: Sokratiese AI-tutor vir dieper begrip

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Sokratiese AI-tutor vir dieper begrip is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: stap 'n konsep, argument, probleem, teks of besluit om in 'n gefokusde keten van vrae. Jy buddy luistert na elke antwoord, bring aannames en hiaten in kaart en duwt jy na jy eie eindsynthese. Probeer: "Help my understand geleentheidskoste."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring
entries.value: Sokratiese tutorhulp

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Sokratiese begeleiding is nie altyd die antwoord. As 'n leerder helemaal geen achtergrond wat, kan 'n kort verduideliking vriendelijker is dan 'n vraag. As iemand vlak vir 'n sperdatum in crisis zit, kan 'n beplanningsmodus soos Exam Prep Planner of 'n wenkmodus soos Homework Coach beter is. As die doel is om termen te onthou, is Flashcard Builder directer.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Sokratiese begeleiding gebruik vrae, hypothesen, wenke en reflectie om dieper begrip op te bouwen dan passief antwoorde lees.

entries.source: Solve math one step at a time
entries.value: Los wiskunde stap vir stap op

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. Depending on where you transact with us and where your payment method was issued, your transaction with us may be subject to foreign exchange fees or differences in prices because of exchange rates.
entries.value: Sommige dele van Diens word gefaktureer op intekeningsbasis ("Subscription(s)"). Elke Competition wat op ons platform word georgaanniseerd, is 'n afsonderlike geleentheid waarvoor by registrasie moet word betaal. Jy word vooraf gefaktureer op herhalende en periodieke basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles word vasgestel afhangend van die tipe intekening dat jy kies by die aankoop van 'n Subscription. Aan die einde van elke Billing Cycle word jy Subscription outomaties onder exact dieselfde voorwaardes verlengd, tensy jy wat kanselleer of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) wat kanselleer. Jy kan die verlenging van jou Subscription kanselleer via jy online rekeningbeheerbladsy of deur kontak op te neem met die klantendiens via support@inspir.app. 'n geldige betaalmetode is vereist om die betaling vir jou intekening te verwerk. Jy moet Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) regte en volledige factuurdata verskaf, waaronder maar nie beperk tot volledige naam, adres, staat, postkode, telefoonnummer en geldige betaalata. Deur sodanige betaalata te verskaf, machtig jy Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) outomaties om alle Subscription-koste wat via jy rekening ontstaan in rekening te bring op sodanige betaalinstrumenten. As outomatiese fakturering om watter reden dan ook mislukt, behou Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) homself die reg vir jou toegang tot die Diens met onmiddellike ingang te beeindig. By bedrieglike activiteit kan Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) wat intekening met onmiddellike ingang kanselleer en kan wat besluit nie word betwist. Vir betaale Dienste moet jy inspir 'n geldige betaalbron verskaf om vir zulke Dienste te besluittalen. Jy erkent en gaan ermee akkoord dat net 'n volwassene (18 jaar of ouder) 'n transaksie of intekening met betrekking tot zulke betaale Dienste kan aangaan. Sommige Dienste kan beskikbaar is as eenmalige aankoop en ander kan as jaarintekening word gekoop. Afhankelijk van waar jy met ons handelt en waar jy betaalmetode is uitgegeven, kan jy transaksie by ons onderhevig is aan koste vir vreemde valuta of prijsverschillen deur wisselkoerse.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Sommige zoektake wat 'n cursusbiblioteek nodig. Ander wat 'n lewendig AI-tutor, 'n wenk, 'n Sokratiese vraag, 'n vasvra of 'n flitskaartdeck nodig. Hierdie bladsye maak wat keuse duideliker.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: Begin hierdie pad

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: Begin met "{value1}" en voeg daarna by wat jy al weet en waar jy vastloopt.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: Begin met 'n duidelike verduideliking

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: Begin met 'n konsep of outline, vraag om een prioriteit, herzie self en gebruik daarna praat of bronkritiek om te kontroleer of die idee duidelik en verdedigbaar is.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: Begin met 'n pijlercluster wat past by jy leertaak, lees een gids en oopmaak daarna die gekoppele openbare leermodus om wat advies om te stapten in oefening.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: Begin met 'n kort diagnostiese vasvra of 'n lijst met vertroue per onderwerp en bou daarna 'n plan rondom die areas wat die meeste onzekerheid gee.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: Begin met 'n eenvoudige verduideliking, test die idee met vrae en stap die swak plekken daarna om in aktiewe herroeping.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Begin met 'n eenvoudige verduideliking en stel daarna Sokratiese vrae totdat jy wat self kan verduidelik.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Begin met 'n spesifiek doel soos "{value1}". Die modus werk die beste wanneer jy vermeldt wat jy al weet, waar jy vastloopt en wat vir hulp jy wil.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Begin met 'n onderwerp, opdrag, konsep, eksamen of idee in die modus wat by die taak pas.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Begin met voorbeeld-aanwysings

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Begin met voorbeeldprompts.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Begin met Learn Anything

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Begin met Learn Anything vir 'n eenvoudige verduideliking, Homework Coach vir 'n taak waar jy vastloopt, of Flashcard Builder wanneer herhalen die doel is.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Begin met Learn Anything as jy 'n onderwerp in gedachten wat. Probeer Socratic Instruction as jy vrae wil in plaas van verduideliking. Gebruik Flashcard Builder wanneer jy iets moet onthou, of Exam Prep Planner wanneer die probleem is jy studietijd te orgaanniseren.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: Begin met Learn Anything wanneer jy oriëntatie en 'n eenvoudige verduideliking nodig wat.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: Begin met Math Step Coach vir vergelijkingen of uitgewerkte oplossings, Homework Coach vir take en Flashcard Builder wanneer jy formules of foutpatronen moet onthou.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Begin met een duidelike vraag

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: Begin met een praktiese gids en oopmaak daarna 'n verwante openbare leermodus zodat wat advies oefening word. Hierdie categorie is ontwerp vir {value1}

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Begin met plek, tyd, identiteit, beperkings en bewysetikette sodat die toneel nie generiese rolspel word nie.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: Begin met prompts wat wat leer aktief hou.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Begin met die openbare gasmodus en gee die skoolversie daarna vorm rondom regte besluithoeften.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Begin met openbare begeleiding en oopmaak daarna die regte modus.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Begin met Talk to a Historical Person vir 'n gesprek rondom 'n historiese figuur. Gebruik Time Travel vir 'n expeditie na 'n plek en periode. Lees die gids Talk to a Historical Person of die prompts en studielus vir Time Travel as jy 'n meer gestruktureerdee werkvloei wil.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: Begin met die breedste leermodus.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: Begin met die gids wat die beste past by die leertaak wat vir jou ligt.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Begin met die taak wat jy gedoen moet kry.

entries.source: Start with the live mode if you need help now, use a prompt if you know the exact move you want, and read the guide when you want the full study loop and mistakes to avoid.
entries.value: Begin met die lewendig modus as jy nu hulp nodig wat, gebruik 'n prompt as jy presies weet watter stap jy wil stapten en lees die gids wanneer jy die volledige studielus en die te vermy foute wil.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the learning problem.
entries.value: Begin met die modus wat past by wat leerprobleem.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Begin met die modus wat past by wat moment.

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: Begin met die openbare leermaat.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Begin met die openbare modusse en gebruik daarna die skolebladsy om implementatiestappe, use-gevalle en vertrouesgrenzen te besluitkijken.

entries.source: Started as public quizzes and student communities in 2013.
entries.value: Begon in 2013 as openbare vasvrae en studentegemeenskappen.

entries.source: Starter prompt
entries.value: Startprompt

entries.source: starter prompts
entries.value: startprompts

entries.source: Starter prompts turn the subject page into a first action.
entries.value: Startprompts maak van die vakbladsy 'n eerste aksie.

entries.source: Starting a new subject, repairing confusion, and turning curiosity into a clear first model.
entries.value: 'n nuwe onderwerp starten, verwarring hervra en nuusgierigheid omstapten in 'n helder eerste model.

entries.source: State the claim
entries.value: Formuleer die bewering

entries.source: State the dilemma and identify stakeholders.
entries.value: Formuleer wat dilemma en benoem die belanghebbenden.

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Formuleer die doel in een zin.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Formuleer die idee duideliker dan aan wat begin.

entries.source: State the reader, claim, and assignment goal before asking for feedback.
entries.value: Noem die lezer, die bewering en die doel van die taak voordat jy om terugvoer vra.

entries.source: State the stuck point
entries.value: Noem die vassteekpunt

entries.source: Stay evidence-aware
entries.value: Bly bewysebewus

entries.source: Step
entries.value: Stap

entries.source: step by step math AI
entries.value: stap-vir-stap wiskunde-AI

entries.source: step by step math help
entries.value: stap-vir-stap wiskundehulp

entries.source: Step checks
entries.value: Stapkontroles

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Tree in gesprek met 'n historiese figuur. Vra vrae, daag idees uit en ervaar die wêreld deur hul era, waardes en beperkings.

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Stap in historiese konteks in, vergelyk argumente en oefen om 'n idee van meer as een kant te sien.

entries.source: Stop procrastinating on math
entries.value: Hou op om wiskunde uit te stel

entries.source: Story
entries.value: Verhaal

entries.source: Story angles
entries.value: Verhaalinvalshoeken

entries.source: story based learning AI
entries.value: AI vir storiegebaseerd leer

entries.source: Story concepts about friendship
entries.value: Storiekonsepte oor vriendskap

entries.source: Story reference
entries.value: Verhaalreferentie

entries.source: Story Tutor
entries.value: Storie-tutor

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: Verander konsepte om in stories, personages, conflicten en gedenkwaardige scènes.

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.source: Story Tutor For Learning Through Narrative
entries.value: Story Tutor vir leer via stories

entries.source: Story Tutor prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts en studielus vir Story Tutor

entries.source: Story, art, music, and brainstorming modes that turn creative work into a guided learning process.
entries.value: Verhaal-, kuns-, musiek- en brainstormmodi wat kreatiewe werk omstapten in 'n begeleid leerproses.

entries.value: Struktureer 'n studiekamer

entries.value: Struktureer notas in leidrade, besonderhede en opsomming

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Gestructureerd oefen help fundamenten op te bouwen vóór en na huiswerk.

entries.value: AI-chat vir studente

entries.value: Studente-forum

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Studentehuiswerk, ouderondersteuning, onderwyserevaluering en zelfstudie wat allemaal 'n ander kader nodig.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Studente

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Studente en selfonderrig-leerders wat struktuur nodig het sonder om die plan in 'n onmoontlike kontrolelys te verander.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Studente wat directe ondersteuning nodig, onderwysers wat gefokus leergedrag nodig, leidinggevenden wat verantwoorde implementatiepaden nodig en vennote wat duidelike manieren nodig om toegang te finansier.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Studente wat vinnigle hulp nodig, maar wat hulp moet wat dink nog steeds in hulle handen laat. inspir stuurt veelvoorkomde studiemomenten na gefokusde openbare modusse in plaas van na een generieke antwoordbox.

entries.source: Students preparing essays, explanations, presentations, interviews, or oral exams.
entries.value: Studente wat opstels, verduidelikings, aanbiedings, onderhoude of mondelinge eksamens voorberei.
